Operation 'signInAnonymous' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is identical to the summary and provides no actionable details. An AI agent needs to understand: (1) what the operation does (creates anonymous session), (2) what it returns (AuthSession with tokens), (3) the side effects (temporary session, can be upgraded), and (4) when to use it (when user wants to defer authentication). The improved description addresses all these aspects using domain-appropriate terminology consistent with the Nhost authentication context.

data.description_suggestion: Creates an anonymous authentication session without requiring credentials. Returns an AuthSession object containing authentication tokens and session information. The anonymous user can later be upgraded to a full account by providing email and password credentials. No user account data is persisted until the session is linked to credentials.
data.reasoning: The current description is identical to the summary and provides no actionable details. An AI agent needs to understand: (1) what the operation does (creates anonymous session), (2) what it returns (AuthSession with tokens), (3) the side effects (temporary session, can be upgraded), and (4) when to use it (when user wants to defer authentication). The improved description addresses all these aspects using domain-appropriate terminology consistent with the Nhost authentication context.

message: Operation 'sendVerificationEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. The current description lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. The improved version clarifies: (1) what triggers the action (sends verification email), (2) expected inputs (authenticated user context via bearer token), (3) what the user must do (click verification link), (4) what is returned (success response), (5) side effects (asynchronous email delivery), and (6) prerequisites (authenticated user). This enables AI agents to understand when and how to invoke this operation appropriately.

data.description_suggestion: Sends a verification email to the authenticated user's email address containing a verification link. The user must click the link to confirm email ownership and complete the verification process. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns a success response. The verification email is sent asynchronously and may take a few moments to arrive. Can only be called by authenticated users.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. message: Operation 'signOut' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is minimal.
